nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public endpoint Twilio voice posts to when an inbound call hits the client's Twilio number. Returns TwiML that <Connect><Stream>s the call to Vapi (sip:<vapi-sip-uri>) so the AI receptionist takes over. Logs the call to agent_conversations + agent_actions. Vapi handles the conversation; transcripts arrive at clx-vapi-transcript-streamer-v1 (existing dormant workflow).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, client_id: $json.client_id, channel: 'voice', thread_external_id: $json.ctx.call_sid, message_count: 1, last_message_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_message_direction: 'inbound', current_status: 'active', agent_active: true, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Log Conversation
nodes.notes: lead_id is NULL on inbound — we don't yet know which lead this is. Phase 4 polish: phone lookup against leads.phone to associate.

parameters.responseBody: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Say>Sorry, this number is not configured. Please try again later.</Say><Hangup/></Response>
